mainEntity.name: Step-by-step: How to optimize my site for AI legal answers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Research Qs, direct answers, EEAT, test.[3][6]
acceptedAnswer.description: **1. Research questions via 'People Also Ask.' 2. Write concise answers with local refs. 3. Add bios/links. 4. Update monthly.**[3][4][6] **Key factors:** 1. Match query phrasing. 2. Signal expertise. 3. Test in AI. **Launch FAQ section today; Phoenix example: cite specific jails.**[3] Follow through.[4]
